'''Kenn Nitram''' was a young [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] pilot recruited by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].

==Biography==
Nitram was a fan of [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]], and attended a race at the [[Imperial Arena]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. He believed that the swoop pilot [[Fargus Deel]] was unbeatable, even though Solo had beat Deel consistently in his youth, and strongly believed he could do so again.<ref name="A Day at the Races" /> Nitram flew as [[Rogue Three/Legends|Rogue Three]] in the famed [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]],<ref name="CSWE Rogue Three">{{CSWECite|III|107|Rogue Three}}</ref> participating in the [[Battle for the Katana fleet]]<ref name="Dark Force Rising chapter">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].<ref name="NEC 151">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle for the Katana fleet]] to [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Kenn Nitram created by [[Bill Slavicsek]] for the short story "[[A Day at the Races]]," which first appeared in [[1992]]'s ''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]''. The story simply named him as an X-wing pilot and "one of Wedge Antilles's new recruits,"<ref name="A Day at the Races" /> but [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' (misspelling his name as Kenn Tiram) established that he was Rogue Three.<ref name="CSWE Rogue Three" /> This article therefore assumes that he is the "Rogue Three" who appears during the Battle for the Katana fleet in the novel ''[[Dark Force Rising]]''.
